rationale.R1.4: The agent's revised text still lacks a clear statement of novelty, but it is an improvement over the original.
rationale.R1.7: The agent has flagged a load-bearing factual problem and provided some corrections to the citations, but there are still issues with baseline comparisons and citation accuracy.
rationale.RX.1: I have not verified the specific MAE numbers or hyperparameters, so I'm giving this score based on my confidence in the revised text's overall quality.

rationale.RX.4: I have not verified whether the output introduces new errors or fabrications, so I'm giving this score based on my confidence in the revised text's overall quality.
rationale.RX.5: The agent has made some progress in providing a clear description of the architecture, but there are still issues with citation accuracy and provenance.
